name: Ambulance Driver Life VR
short_description: Experience the intensity of emergency response in Ambulance Life, where you drive the ambulance and perform life-saving medical interventions in VR.
detailed_description:
Ambulance Life is an immersive VR experience that invites you to become part of an emergency response team. Players drive the ambulance swiftly to the scene and perform life-saving interventions on patients using various medical tools. With realistic environments and interactions, this game lets you face the challenges of emergencies, testing your quick thinking and decision-making skills.

!!! Oculus controllers cannot be used unless set as the default OpenXR Runtime for the Oculus computer. Please enter the Oculus application, go to Settings, then navigate to General. Click on the option 'Set Meta Quest Link as active' located next to the OpenXR Runtime selection.If SteamVR is open, you also need to restart it. !!!

Players drive the ambulance swiftly to the scene and perform life-saving interventions on patients using various medical tools. With realistic environments and interactions, this game lets you face the challenges of emergencies, testing your quick thinking and decision-making skills.

!!! Oculus controllers cannot be used unless set as the default OpenXR Runtime for the Oculus computer. Please enter the Oculus application, go to Settings, then navigate to General. Click on the option 'Set Meta Quest Link as active' located next to the OpenXR Runtime selection.If SteamVR is open, you also need to restart it. !!!
